   provider: "openai",

@@ -45,9 +47,12 @@ export function validateConfig(config: Config): void {
   if (!config.model) {
     throw new Error("Model is required");
   }

+  if (typeof config.editor !== "boolean") {
+    throw new Error("Editor must be a boolean");
+  }
+
   if (!config.prompt) {
     throw new Error("Prompt is required");
   }
 }
